title: Make Triple item height work
excerpt: Triple height for Long Text columns shows only 2 lines vertically centered. I need to see 3 lines (or more).

posts.author: martin_w (Martin Walbrühl)
posts.cookedHtml: Triple height for Long Text columns shows only 2 lines vertically centered. I need to see 3 lines (or more).

posts.author: BenH (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! At least show three lines of text properly.

posts.author: koko (Kortney Cervantes)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! I have a few clients who have asked for this now.
